# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "virtualNetworkName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "addressPrefix": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subnets": {
      "type": "array"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "defaultSubnetName": "[concat(parameters('virtualNetworkName'), '-default')]",
    "webSubnetName": "[concat(parameters('virtualNetworkName'), '-web')]",
    "appSubnetName": "[concat(parameters('virtualNetworkName'), '-app')]",
    "databaseSubnetName": "[concat(parameters('virtualNetworkName'), '-database')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('virtualNetworkName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('addressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('defaultSubnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('addressPrefix')]"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[variables('webSubnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('addressPrefix')]"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[variables('appSubnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('addressPrefix')]"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[variables('databaseSubnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('addressPrefix')]"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ]
}
